draft_subtitle: Select a game mode, choose the brawlers already picked by both teams, and discover the best options for your team.
draft_subtitle_2: Recommendations are based on real match data, but the final outcome will always depend on the players' skill.
select_scenario: Select a Game Mode and a Map to open the brawler selection panel.
error_duplicate_brawlers: There are duplicate brawlers in the draft.
select_remaining_enemies: Select the remaining enemy brawlers to calculate the win probability.
meta_brawler_subtitle: Performance overview of every brawler in the game.
meta_score_explanation: The Meta Score combines Win Rate (60%) and global Pick Rate (40%) to estimate how strong a brawler is in the current meta.
meta_subtitle: Discover the most played and most effective brawlers on each map based on real match history.
error_empty_db: Database is empty or could not be found.
modes_subtitle: Global meta analysis and top picks for each game mode.
verdict_superior: Verdict: Superior composition. Your Team has a solid advantage!
verdict_disadvantage: Verdict: Structural disadvantage. The Enemy Team has the upper hand.
verdict_balanced: Verdict: A highly balanced matchup. The outcome will depend entirely on the players' skill.
